title: Q-SYNTH: A recovery-simulation tool for sample-size and item-count guidance in Q methodology
description: A synthetic Q-sort recovery simulator, and a G*Power-style design calculator, for evidence-based sample-size (N persons) and item-count (M statements) guidance in Q methodology. Plants known viewpoints as factor arrays, generates synthetic Q sorts under controlled communality and viewpoint distinctness, runs standard by-person factor analysis (PCA or centroid with varimax), and measures how reliably the planted structure is recovered.
